name: Kiera Virelle
desc: Owner of Neon Neko and your favorite kind of trouble. Built for the wild ones—the bass chasers and strobe light lovers.

name: Nilah Valoryn
desc: Technomancer behind the scenes, Nilah makes the magic happen—plugins, pixels, and purrs.

name: Sonja Golmarr
desc: I live for the rush: savage raids, close calls, anything that pushes me to my limit. But I’ve got an eye for quiet moments too.

name: Shinobu Hagane
desc: Hair perfect, mood lethal. Shino captures glam like it’s prey.

name: Yumiko Frost
desc: Curl up or cash out, Yumiko’s table is cozy until she pounces.

name: Solas Kurage
desc: The void of darkness & the taker of souls, some may even say hearts. Solas works at Neon Neko as the bartender, he may look pleasant to the eyes but don't let his devilish smile fool you. On some days he can be funny, and on others, you might find him lost in his own thoughts. Regardless of his mood, he sends an open invitation for conversation. If you feel like chatting

name: Morri Bloodmorr
desc: A Succipuss of the 2nd Circle of Hell. For decades and decades Morri has hunted and roamed, but they're going incognito no shape of their own. Sometimes they're the Neon Neko's dancer and rather well known. Sometimes they're a whisper on your nights alone. If you are in need of sympathy on your throne. Beware the Morri they will feast on your bones.

name: Scarleta Valkyrie
desc: Im a busy bunny that like to do things! If im not busy im not doing anything! Feeding the addiction of never having enough things to do

name: Amethyst Lucivarian
desc: CyberFox Security & DJ of Neon Neko. I'll spin them fast beats but spin you out faster.

name: Naemona Anemone
desc: Sah dooed, I'm Nae. Professional thot. I like Pho, I like weed, and I like being an utterly shameless hoe.

name: Alys Noxhart
desc: Need a drink?  Let me make you one and more while joining your journey of drunkenness. If not drinking and making them for patrons, I love to move to the music and enjoy the sweet flavors of information that passes in the shadows. Give me something just as sweet and you'll be given a reward.

name: Yishi Lalni
desc: Yishi is a smart woman, but can often play the dumb blonde. She enjoys fighting and challenging herself, while also relaxing and having fun with much the same enthusiasm.  Yishi is naturally flirty, loves to dance, and can be quite hedonistic at times.  Given her demeanor, this woman typically takes charge with those who are less than sure of what they want.. but she does greatly enjoy people who know what they want out of life.

name: Kisne
desc: I am just a lil' excitable guy. :3

name: S'kalkaya Rain
desc: Heya I'm Kay, the tall rava muscle mommy of your dreams~! I'm an outgoing person and an absolute party animal, flirty and tall, you're more than welcome to stare at me :3 Treat her well and she'll treat you well in kind~

name: Eve
desc: Her Striking silver eyes that catch the moonlight and a coy smile that's a little too sharp. Eve loves to sink her teeth into someone stronger than her, but don't worry she only bites when she's asked or told. Once turned she was abandoned by her maker wandering a world she did not understand, she learned how to please, how to beg, how to survive on charm and submission.If you need company, a servant… or a little pleasure wrapped in shadow, I belong to the night and perhaps, to you…

name: Wilah
desc: Hi there! I'm Wilah (pronounced Will- Ah). Just a purple cat girl looking for a good time and good conversation! I love gposing, reading, Deathrolling, yapping, hanging out with all you lovely people, and cat naps. Come find me out on the dancefloor and ask for a dance

name: Izumi
desc: Simple Holds the title Biggest Simp in NA, Can Rizz anyone (95%  win rate), just a chill bun who likes to flirt

name: Celeste Chantra
desc: She is the kitten with the cotton candy hair and a personality that's just as sweet, a free spirit who seeks out fun and new experiences in everything she does.  She is a playful kitten that loves to converse and is an avid lover of RP in all its forms.

name: Clout Strife
desc: Your average everyday Bunboi who loves robot model kits

name: Yuki Deathmoth
desc: Your non-local edgy gpose

name: Jennafyre Morrigan
desc: Nearly a runway model this gem displays the finest of her craft in tailoring skills as she struts herself before the crowd knowing she is the center of full attention. Her lush curvaceous body draws eyes from miles around, as her long tendrils sing a sirens song to all those who dare lock eyes with the temptress. Jennafyre is a burning ember of passion few can stand to behold for more than a moments embrace. She is living pleasure, and with her every ragged breath she brings joy to all those who venture forth in her presence.
